summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; each listed open PR was classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, or fix artifacts are planned.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused code and proof should stay open for maintainer review, not be deduped or closed in this inventory shard.
